lineup_source: Mexico vs South Korea, Group A, 18 June 2026 (4-3-3)

players.name: Raúl Rangel
players.note: Born in Zapotlán el Grande, Jalisco, Mexico on 25 February 2000. No parental origin documented; Mexican surname, assumed Mexican (low confidence).

players.name: Jorge Sánchez
players.note: Born in Torreón, Coahuila, Mexico on 10 December 1997. No parental origin documented; Mexican surname, assumed Mexican (low confidence).

players.name: Edson Álvarez
players.note: Born in Tlalnepantla de Baz, Mexico. Wikipedia names his parents as Adriana Velázquez and Evaristo Álvarez; both bear Mexican surnames with no foreign origin documented.

players.name: Johan Vásquez
players.note: Born in Navojoa, Sonora, Mexico on 22 October 1998. No parental origin documented; Mexican surname, assumed Mexican (low confidence).

players.name: Jesús Gallardo
players.note: Born in Cárdenas, Tabasco, Mexico on 15 August 1994. No parental origin documented; Mexican surname, assumed Mexican (low confidence).

players.name: Luis Romo
players.note: Born in Los Mochis, Sinaloa, Mexico. No parental origin documented; Mexican surname, assumed Mexican (low confidence).

players.name: Erik Lira
players.note: Born in Mexico City, Mexico on 8 May 2000. No parental origin documented; Mexican surname, assumed Mexican (low confidence).

players.name: Brian Gutiérrez
players.note: Born in Berwyn, Illinois, USA on 17 June 2003. Wikipedia states his parents 'are originally from San Juan de los Lagos, Jalisco,' Mexico. Represents Mexico internationally.

players.name: Roberto Alvarado
players.note: Born in Salamanca, Guanajuato, Mexico on 7 September 1998 to Guillermo Alvarado and Julia Hernández. Parents' origins not documented; Mexican surnames, assumed Mexican (low confidence).

players.name: Raúl Jiménez
players.note: Born in Tepeji del Río, Hidalgo, Mexico on 5 May 1991. Full name Raúl Alonso Jiménez Rodríguez; both paternal (Jiménez) and maternal (Rodríguez) surnames are Mexican. No foreign parental origin documented.

players.name: Julián Quiñones
players.note: Born in Magüí Payán, Nariño, Colombia on 24 March 1997. His mother Gloria is Colombian; his biological father's origin is not documented but family is from Colombia. Became a Mexican citizen in 2023 and represents Mexico internationally.
